name: Den's Workspace - Editorial Platform v2 - Future Debate Ready

parameters.content:
Den's Workspace Editorial Platform v2

Required n8n environment variables:
DENS_SITE_URL=https://your-site.com
N8N_INTEGRATION_SECRET=same value as site env
DW_RSS_FEEDS=https://example.com/rss,https://example.com/feed
DW_HN_QUERIES=AI agents,robotics,automation
DW_YOUTUBE_QUERIES=AI agents future of work,humanoid robots
YOUTUBE_API_KEY=your key
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=bot token for inline buttons
TELEGRAM_APPROVAL_CHAT_ID=closed group id
TELEGRAM_APPROVAL_TOPIC_RU=optional topic id
TELEGRAM_APPROVAL_TOPIC_EN=optional topic id
TELEGRAM_PUBLIC_CHAT_ID=public channel/group id
SUPABASE_URL=project url
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=server key for publisher only

Credentials to attach after import:
- OpenAI API credential on AI Editorial Rewrite
- Telegram credential on Telegram Callback and Publish to Telegram

This workflow writes to the website integration API. The website creates Supabase articles that appear in /admin.

parameters.jsCode:
const queries = String($env.DW_YOUTUBE_QUERIES || 'AI agents future of work,humanoid robots,AI robotics debate').split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
return queries.map(query => ({ json: { query } }));

const video = $('Extract YouTube Video IDs').item.json;
const comments = ($json.items || []).map(item => item.snippet?.topLevelComment?.snippet?.textDisplay).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 30);
const raw = [
  video.title,
  video.description,
  comments.length ? 'Audience comments:
- ' + comments.join('
- ') : 'No comments available.'
].join('

');
return [{ json: {
  externalId: 'youtube:' + video.videoId,
  sourcePlatform: 'manual',
  sourceName: 'YouTube',
  sourceUrl: video.url,
  canonicalUrl: video.url,
  author: video.channelTitle || null,
  locale: 'en',
  title: String(video.title || 'YouTube video').slice(0, 500),
  rawContent: raw,
  imageUrl: video.imageUrl || null,
  publishedAt: video.publishedAt || null,
  category: 'ai'
}}];
